case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS THOGERSON, ELYSE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT THOGERSON, ELYSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOGERSON, ELYSE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-07-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-14-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOGERSON, ELYSE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
